ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "roll_no" TEXT /* Roll number of the student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the student belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the university */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual graduation date of the student */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the student (e.g., enrolled, graduated, on leave) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code for the course (e.g., CS301) */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "course_type" TEXT /* Type of the course (e.g., core, elective) */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course (e.g., course codes separated by commas) */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam result */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who took the exam */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course for which the exam was taken */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade obtained by the student (e.g., A+, A, B+, B) */,
  "marks" INTEGER /* Marks obtained by the student out of the maximum */,
  "exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the exam */,
  "exam_type" TEXT /* Type of the exam (e.g., midterm, final, quiz) */,
  "total_marks" INTEGER /* Total marks for the exam */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who graded the exam */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_results_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_results_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_results_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semesters" (
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semester */,
  "semester_name" TEXT /* Name of the semester (e.g., Spring 2023) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the semester */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the semester */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Academic year of the semester */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the semester (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_courses" (
  "student_course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student-course combination */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who took the course */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the semester in which the course was taken */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course taken by the student */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade for the course */,
  "final_marks" INTEGER /* Final marks for the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who taught the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_courses_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_courses_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_courses_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who obtained the grade */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the semester in which the grade was obtained */,
  "grade_point" REAL /* Grade point obtained by the student (out of 10) */,
  "sgpa" REAL /* Semester grade point average */,
  "cgpa" REAL /* Cumulative grade point average */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "office_phone" TEXT /* Office phone number of the instructor */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "course_instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course-instructor combination */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course taught by the instructor */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the semester in which the course is taught */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient (student or instructor) */,
  "recipient_type" TEXT /* Type of recipient (student or instructor) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, unread) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., exam schedule, grade release) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., student, instructor, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role combination */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the role is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_credentials" (
  "credential_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of login credentials */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the credentials */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password chosen by the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "failed_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, locked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credential_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_credentials_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_credentials_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
